case_title: DEBORAH BETH KURSCH VS. APPLE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KURSCH, DEBORAH BETH AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.
